questionHtml:
Which contains the most atoms of oxygen?

A.  64 g of O2

B.  1.2 × 1024 molecules of O2

C.  64 g of C3H5O3

D.  1.2 × 1024 molecules of C3H5O3

meta.title: Which contains the most atoms of oxygen? A. 64 g of O2 B. 1.2 × 1024 molecules of O2 C. 64 g of C3H5O3 D. 1.2 × 1024 molecules of C3H5O3
